message:
test(pipeline): add tests for dry run paths and fix flaky timeout test

- Add tests for selectPaneExcluding dry run mode with pane exclusion
- Add tests for waitForIdle with context cancellation and deadline
- Add tests for persistState nil state and empty project dir handling
- Add tests for snapshotState deep copy functionality
- Add TestExecutor_Run_DryRun_WithParallel and WithLoop tests
- Fix flaky TestExecuteParallel_GroupTimeout by increasing timeout from
  100ms to 5s to account for test infrastructure overhead
- Improve pipeline coverage from 67.0% to 69.0%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
